title: More Smithing Tables
description: Smithing Tables for every kind of wood
body:
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/requires-quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Smithing-Tables) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Smithing Tables Fill your builds with colourful tool and armor upgrading now that each wood type has its own smithing table. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Smithing-Tables/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Adding 12 new _Smithing Tables_ to Minecraft.
How can I craft vanilla Smithing Tables using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Smithing Table crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft smithing tables and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/wfhve.webp) Looking out of the window of a plains village toolsmith's house onto a fisher cottage: We can see that instead of a regular _Smithing Table_, _Spruce Barrels_ and a regular _Chest_, the game now generates the village with an _**Oak Smithing Table**_, _**Oak Barrels**_ (from [More Barrel Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-barrel-variants)) and an _**Oak Chest**_ (from [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion)). --- ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/4qegi.gif)**]()
